name: Rubber Base Gel
tagline: The flexible foundation every nail tech needs
targetAudience: nail techs dealing with lifting or weak natural nails

name: Polygel

targetAudience: nail techs who want neater, more controlled overlays

name: Gel Polish

name: Acrylic System

name: Nail Training Course
